Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Receives the AI-generated email content via API and sends it to the configured R1 Concepts contact lists.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or open support tickets from HubSpot to feed into the AI classification pipeline.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a personalized reply for the R1 Concepts support team to review and send.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the classification label and drafted reply back to the ticket record for the support team to review and act on.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls form submissions from Amazon in-box flyer return and issue forms stored in HubSpot.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact activity to detect when DFC customers visit or engage with the R1 Concepts website.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Planned customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts — specific connections and workflow are not yet defined.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Expected to improve customer self-service and response times once deployed.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories and listings to identify businesses in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds and validates contact email addresses for the identified businesses to enable outreach.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Logs discovered leads and sends personalized warm intro emails pitching the 13140 Midway Place Cerritos sublet opportunity.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Creates a repeatable daily outreach pipeline for the sublet with zero manual effort, accelerating the path to a signed tenant.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls current campaign performance data for R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts including spend, clicks, and conversion metrics.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Accelerates ad optimization cycles and surfaces insights that improve ROAS across R1 and DFC campaigns simultaneously.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching the input keywords, returning channel data and video performance metrics.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Rapidly surfaces relevant creators from YouTube's vast library, replacing hours of manual search with structured, keyword-targeted results.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Retrieves Instagram profile data for discovered creators to assess their cross-platform presence and audience size.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Gives a fuller picture of each creator's reach by capturing Instagram metrics alongside YouTube data.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes aggregated creator data from all sources and classifies creators by relevance, niche fit, and audience quality.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters a large raw creator pool down to the most strategically relevant prospects, saving significant manual vetting time.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, audience size, niche relevance, and content quality.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective shortlist of creators so partnership decisions are data-driven and the best-fit creators are prioritized.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves the qualified creator list and previously learned outreach sequences and prompt templates stored in Drive.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach campaign starts from vetted, up-to-date creator data and proven messaging frameworks, eliminating manual file hunting.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach messages for each creator by applying learned sequences and prompts to their profile data.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, on-brand outreach at scale without copywriting time, increasing creator response rates through relevant personalization.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator from the designated sender account.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates high-volume creator prospecting outreach, saving hours of manual sending while maintaining a personal, direct-to-inbox delivery.

Creator Reponse.action: Loads historical influencer email conversations and negotiation outcomes to serve as learned context for response generation.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds AI responses in real negotiation history, enabling smarter, context-aware replies that reflect what has worked in past deals.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes incoming creator replies and generates contextually appropriate negotiation or follow-up responses based on learned conversation patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles creator negotiation dialogue intelligently and consistently, reducing back-and-forth delays and keeping deal momentum without constant human oversight.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends or drafts the AI-crafted negotiation response back to the creator within the existing email thread.
Creator Reponse.impact: Accelerates creator deal cycles by responding promptly and professionally, reducing the time from first contact to signed agreement.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Reads the weekly MHM vehicle data and cross-references it against the New Availability Guide to identify matching part numbers and build the load sheet.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates manual load sheet creation by automating the matching logic, turning a multi-hour task into seconds with zero lookup errors.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates a new HubSpot email draft populated with the generated load sheet and sales sheet assets, ready for the Must Have Monday send.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a confirmation message to the relevant Teams channel notifying the team that the MHM email draft and load sheet are ready for review.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Keeps stakeholders instantly informed without email chains, enabling fast human review and approval before the campaign sends.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using product data and DFC brand guidelines as input.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces launch-ready email copy in seconds, allowing the marketing team to go from product data to draft without any manual writing.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates structured email drafts in HubSpot with the AI-generated copy, attaches the relevant sales sheets, and organizes them within the correct campaign folder.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Delivers publication-ready HubSpot email drafts with assets attached, cutting campaign setup time and ensuring nothing is missed before send.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth data, and email performance statistics for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Aggregates CRM reporting data instantly, replacing manual HubSpot report exports that previously required significant analyst time.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts SMS campaign performance data including send volume, click-through rates, and revenue attribution for the month.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Brings SMS channel data into the unified deck automatically, eliminating a separate manual export and copy-paste step.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Fetches web traffic, session, conversion, and channel performance data for the reporting month from Google Analytics 4.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Provides accurate, real-time web performance figures without manual GA4 report building or data transcription errors.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Writes all collected metrics into slides 48 through 55 of the Marketing Highlights deck, updating charts, text fields, and tables with current period data.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers a fully updated, presentation-ready deck section in minutes instead of hours, freeing analysts from repetitive monthly slide updates.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps by comparing R1 Concepts' current search impressions and rankings against competitor performance data.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Surfaces high-opportunity keywords that competitors rank for but R1 Concepts does not, enabling content investment where SEO gains are most likely.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Writes SEO-optimized blog articles targeting the identified keyword gaps, structured for readability and search engine relevance.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publish-ready, keyword-targeted blog content at scale, dramatically reducing content production time and cost per article.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the generated blog post to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields populated including meta title, description, and focus keyphrase.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Completes the full content pipeline from keyword research to live publication without manual CMS work, compressing weeks of content output into hours.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open purchase order data including vendor names, PO numbers, order dates, and outstanding quantities for follow-up processing.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number inputs and matches them against the embedded New Availability Guide logic within the browser-based tool.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Launches a Chrome browser session, navigates to Attentive, locates the most recent MHM SMS campaign, and clones it as the starting point for the new week.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports transactional sales data including order history, customer purchase frequency, product SKUs, and revenue figures for analysis.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors William Nguyen's Teams channel for a newly uploaded Excel file each week and extracts the download link.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully drafted B2B SEO blog posts targeting DFC's core audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — using keyword-driven prompts and brand guidelines.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-generated blog post with SEO metadata, headers, and formatting applied directly to the DFC WordPress site.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style videos and Bing Images for vehicle visuals to inform the script and source thumbnail assets.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword rankings, impressions, clicks, and average position for all DFC blog URLs.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Receives incoming customer support tickets and routes them into the automation pipeline for processing.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors Asana for task updates, new assignments, deadline changes, or project status shifts.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the Agent Tracker sheet and extracts the latest status, progress notes, and metadata for all active agents.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Surfaces inventory gaps automatically, giving Mark actionable intelligence on sourcing opportunities without manual comparison work.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark a formatted Excel file showing what DFC stocks for the requested vehicle and what is absent from current inventory.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a polished, ready-to-use catalog file directly to Mark within minutes of submission, replacing a process that previously took significant manual effort.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit shipments.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent lookups by centralizing all live inventory data into one automated pull, saving hours of redundant manual work each week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the existing backorder report by appending the live inventory fields and flagging any parts with no available source or resolution path.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into a dynamic, decision-ready document that immediately shows which orders can be resolved and which are dead ends.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected backorder items, tailored to the status of each part.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates manual drafting of customer updates by producing ready-to-send or lightly-edited communications, accelerating response time and improving customer experience.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor fitment data by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitor fitment reference in a fraction of the time manual catalog review would require, covering three sources simultaneously.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor inventory to identify which fitments DFC covers and which represent gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Pinpoints specific market opportunities where competitors have coverage that DFC lacks, giving Dino a clear product development and sourcing roadmap.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to relevant customers asking about demand for specific two-piece rotor fitments identified as gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Generates real demand signal data from the market without manual outreach effort, validating which gaps are worth filling before committing to inventory investment.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped fitment data, DFC cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, organized reference document that Dino can immediately use for product planning, replacing a fragmented manual process across multiple sources.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy across campaigns and ad sets into the workflow for phrase-level scanning.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures 100% of live ad copy in one automated pull, ensuring no active ad is missed during compliance or quality investigations.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every piece of ad copy for the specified target phrases and records the exact field and verbatim copy where each match is found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Completes a review that would take a human hours across dozens of campaigns in seconds, with precise attribution so issues can be acted on immediately.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured flagged-copy report listing every ad where a target phrase was detected, including the exact field and copy text for each match.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an immediately actionable compliance or quality report without requiring platform access, enabling fast review and resolution by the right team member.

summary: The automation pipeline is in strong shape, with 55 total agents across the board — 28 completed, 9 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages, so the roster remains consistent with last week's update. The team continues to build on a solid foundation of live, running automations while several key projects remain actively in development. Great work all around — steady progress and a growing library of tools powering the team forward!
